name: WOLFBOT
description: Professional WhatsApp Bot with auto-session authentication

SESSION_ID.description: REQUIRED: Your WhatsApp session ID. Must begin with 'WOLF-BOT:'

DATABASE_URL.description: OPTIONAL: PostgreSQL connection string for persistent storage. Supports Heroku Postgres, Supabase, Neon, Railway, etc. Format: postgres://user:password@host:5432/dbname?sslmode=require — Leave blank to run on SQLite only.

PTERODACTYL_KEY.description: OPTIONAL: Your Pterodactyl Application API key (ptlc_...). Only needed if you use panel commands.

PTERODACTYL_URL.description: OPTIONAL: Your Pterodactyl panel URL (e.g. https://panel.example.com). Only needed if you use panel commands.

PAYSTACK_KEY.description: OPTIONAL: Your Paystack secret key (sk_live_... or sk_test_...). Only needed for M-Pesa STK push payments.

BOT_PREFIX.description: OPTIONAL: Command prefix for the bot (e.g. . or ! or ?). Defaults to '.' if not set. Automatically updated when you use .setprefix.

BOT_MODE.description: OPTIONAL: Bot operating mode. Options: public, private, group, solo, sudo, super, buttons, channel. Defaults to 'public'. Automatically updated when you use .setmode.

BOT_NAME.description: OPTIONAL: Display name for the bot shown in menus and messages. Defaults to 'WOLFBOT'. Automatically updated when you use .setbotname.

BOT_TIMEZONE.description: OPTIONAL: Timezone for time/date display in menus (e.g. Africa/Lagos, Asia/Kolkata, America/New_York). Defaults to UTC. Automatically updated when you use .settimezone.

OWNER_NUMBER.description: OPTIONAL: Your WhatsApp number in international format without + (e.g. 2348012345678). Used to scope settings to your bot instance and grant owner privileges.
